name: man
description: Displays online manual documentation pages. Searches the manual path for pages matching the given section and keyword. Supports filtering by section (1-9), displaying all pages (-a), showing debug info (-d), emulating whatis(-f) or apropos(-k), and specifying a pager (-P). Use for finding and viewing command documentation, checking manual page sections, or searching for help pages.

input.description: Keyword or manual page name as command arguments. The first argument is the section (optional), followed by the page name or keyword. No standard input required.

output.description: Manual page content or location of the manual page (if -w is used). Returns nothing if no matching pages are found.
